subject: Re: M not responding
body:
Hi Dimitry,

I did indeed, I’ll resize to the raw data pixel size and run again - thanks for the quick response!

Cheers,

Alister

> On 1 Sep 2020, at 13:59, teg...@gmail.com <tegunov@gmail.com> wrote:
> 
> ﻿Hi Alister,
> 
> did you specify a larger pixel size for your species than the raw data by any chance? Just noticed that it leads to the same error due to a recently introduced change.
> 
> Cheers,
> Dimitry
> 
>> On Monday, August 31, 2020 at 4:00:30 PM UTC+2 alist...@gmail.com wrote:

>>

>>

>>>>>> Hi Shyamal,
>>>>>> 
>>>>>> I have a weird recurring issue which is similar, M sometimes hangs when trying to write files at the end of a refinement. In my case it seems to be some file permissions issue, even though everywhere I have full access unclicking the read-only checkbox and applying recursively down through the directory seems to fix it!
>>>>>> 
>>>>>> Cheers,
>>>>>> 
>>>>>> Alister
